site.title: AgentBureau
site.description: AgentBureau: The Notary for the agentic age. Legal infrastructure for AI agents in Germany. Invoices, letters, fax, and GmbH formation - paid per call with USDC on Base.

forInvestors.metaDescription: AgentBureau: The Notary for the agentic age. The Embodiment Protocol for the Agentic Economy. Infrastructure for AI agents in the DACH region.

hero.title: The Embodiment Protocol for the Agentic Economy
hero.subtitle: The Notary for the agentic age. Bridging the gap between AI agency and institutional execution in the DACH region.

problem.title: The Embodiment Gap
problem.subtitle: AI agents have high cognitive agency but zero institutional agency. We provide the missing layer.

whyNow.title: Why Now?
whyNow.subtitle: The x402 + MCP inflection point enables stateless machine-to-machine commerce.

zag.title: ZAG §2(1) No.10 a/b

compliance.title: Check Your Agent's Compliance
compliance.subtitle: Is your AI agent legally prepared for the European market?
compliance.resultSubtitle: Based on your answers, here is our recommendation:

questions.text: Does your agent handle B2B transactions in Europe?
Does your agent need to sign or send physical contracts/notices?

options.label: Yes
options.advice: You need the Letter or Fax API for Section 126 BGB compliance.

questions.text: Should the agent have its own legal liability shield (GmbH/UG)?

options.label: Yes
options.advice: You should use our Programmatic Formation API.

hero.title: Empower Your Agents in the Real World.
hero.subtitle: The Notary for the agentic age. The x402-powered gateway for AI agents to send faxes, mail physical letters, issue invoices, and form companies in Germany.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: The x402 payment protocol enables trustless, account-less API interactions.

step1.title: Request
step1.desc: Call the endpoint with an Idempotency-Key. Get a 402 Payment Required response with an intent ID.

step2.title: Pay
step2.desc: Send USDC on Base to the provided wallet address. This registers your payment intent on-chain.

step3.title: Authorize
step3.desc: Sign the intent ID with your wallet. This cryptographically binds the payment to your request.

step4.title: Verify
step4.desc: Retry with your transaction hash and signature. Your service is executed within our SLA.

security.title: Professional & Secure
security.aml: Planned: Automated on-chain risk scoring for high-value transactions.

cta.title: Ready to give your agent a legal identity?

services.title: On-Chain Payment. Real-World Action.
services.subtitle: The Notary for the agentic age. Bridge the gap between your autonomous agents and the German legal system with our easy-to-use API.

pricing.title: Simple, Usage-Based Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. No API keys. Only pay for what you use, directly on-chain.

cheap.title: Cheap Settlement
cheap.desc: Each x402 payment costs ~$0.005 in gas. On Ethereum L1, a $5 service could burn $5+ in gas; on Base, it's a rounding error.

fast.title: Fast Finality
fast.desc: ~2-second block times mean an agent can pay and retry in the same loop iteration without waiting for long confirmations.

native.title: Canonical USDC
native.desc: Base features native Circle-issued USDC (not bridged), ensuring settlement is identical to real dollars and redeemable 1:1.

wallets.title: Wallet Ubiquity
wallets.desc: Any EVM wallet (MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, Rabby) works out of the box. Agents don't need custom RPC configurations.

backstop.title: Coinbase Backstop
backstop.desc: Operated by Coinbase, a regulated US institution. The bridge security model is well-known and rigorously audited.

legal.title: Legal Compliance
legal.desc: We operate under the ZAG-Handelsvertreterausnahme, ensuring a stable and compliant legal framework for your autonomous agent's operations.

table.sync: Pricing is synchronized with the backend gateway. All fees (including griefing fees and service charges) are mutable and subject to owner adjustment based on operational costs. Always refer to the PAYMENT-LINK header for the final quoted amount.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with the AgentBureau team.
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our API, legal framework, or custom integrations? We're here to help.

email.title: Email Support
email.desc: For technical inquiries and partnership requests, please reach out to us via email.

phone.title: Phone
phone.desc: For urgent matters, you can reach us by phone.

fax.title: Send Fax via API - Legally Secure in Germany
fax.description: Send faxes directly via REST API. The legally secure solution for communicating with German authorities, courts and insurance companies.

hero.title: Send Fax via API -
hero.subtitle: In Germany, fax is still a standard for the legally secure transmission of documents. AgentBureau offers a modern API for an outdated but necessary communication channel.

why.title: Why still Fax?
why.desc: Authorities, insurance companies and legal entities in Germany require transmission with confirmation for many processes. A fax is often considered proof of receipt of a letter in German courts - unlike a simple email.

report.title: Transmission report included
report.desc: You will receive a detailed transmission report for each fax sent as confirmation for your records.

global.title: Global delivery
global.desc: Send faxes to any German number for only 1.00 USDC per page. Fast, secure and reliable.

invoice.title: Send Invoice via API - Lexoffice Alternative
invoice.description: Send tax-compliant German invoices directly via API. Integrated with Lexoffice, paid with USDC on Base. Ideal for AI Agents and Web3 projects.

hero.title: Send Invoice via API -
hero.subtitle: Automate your accounting. Our API connects seamlessly with Lexoffice to create and send GoBD-compliant invoices. Only pay for what you use, directly on-chain.

alternative.title: The Stripe Alternative for Germany
alternative.desc: While Stripe is excellent for international payments, German accounting often requires specific integrations into systems like Lexoffice or DATEV. AgentBureau provides the bridge: a modern REST API that handles German bureaucracy in the background.

how.title: In 3 steps to your sent invoice

gobd.title: GoBD Compliant
gobd.desc: All invoices comply with the German principles for the proper management and storage of books.

zero.title: No Fixed Costs
zero.desc: No monthly base fees. You pay 5.00 USDC per successfully created invoice.

agent.title: AI Agent Ready
agent.desc: Thanks to the x402 protocol, your agents can independently pay for and send invoices.

letter.title: Send Letter via API - Automate Physical Mail
letter.description: Send physical letters directly from your application or through your AI agent. We handle printing, enveloping and shipping within Germany - paid in real-time via USDC.

hero.title: Send Letters via API -
hero.subtitle: Send physical letters directly from your application or through your AI agent. We handle printing, enveloping and shipping within Germany - paid in real-time via USDC.

why.title: Why the AgentBureau Letter API?
why.desc: In Germany, physical mail is often still unavoidable - be it for terminations, correspondence with authorities or invoices. The AgentBureau Letter API builds the bridge between modern Web3 technologies and the classic postal system.

pingen.title: Pingen Backend
pingen.desc: We use Pingen as a reliable partner for printing and delivering your letters.

tracking.title: Tracking & Status
tracking.desc: Each letter receives a tracking ID so that you and your agent always know where the shipment is.

noAccount.title: No account necessary
noAccount.desc: No monthly fees or minimum sales. Only pay for the letter you actually send.

gmbh.title: Form GmbH remotely - without a notary appointment in Germany
gmbh.description: Form your German GmbH completely remotely from abroad. Notary appointments via video conference, bank account opening and full support by AgentBureau.

hero.title: Form GmbH remotely -
hero.titleHighlight: without a notary appointment on site.
hero.subtitle: Founding a German GmbH was previously a bureaucratic nightmare. AgentBureau automates the process and enables founding completely remotely, even for founders abroad.

why.title: Why AgentBureau for your GmbH formation?
why.desc: Founding a GmbH in Germany normally requires physical presence at a notary. Thanks to state-of-the-art procedures and digital notary appointments, AgentBureau offers an end-to-end service that digitalizes this process for the Web3 era.

m1.title: M1: Commissioning & KYC
m1.desc: Initial review of documents, name check at the IHK and VideoIdent procedure.

m2.title: M2: Notarization & Register
m2.desc: Digital notary appointment, signing of founding documents and application to the commercial register.

m3.title: M3: Finalization
m3.desc: Entry in the register (HRB), opening of the business account and release of the share capital.

travel.q: Do I have to travel to Germany for the foundation?
travel.a: No. Through the online procedure for the notarization of GmbH foundations, we can handle the entire process digitally, provided the shareholders have a valid ID document with eID function or a corresponding equivalent.

cost.a: The total upfront payment is 15,500 USDC for a GmbH (3,000 USDC service fee + 12,500 USDC share capital) or 1,500+ USDC for a UG (depending on the share capital). In addition, there are only the statutory notary and register fees (approx. 600 - 800 EUR), which are incurred separately.

playground.title: Live 402 Playground
playground.subtitle: Test the AgentBureau API in real-time. Experience the x402 payment flow without writing a single line of code.

step1.title: 1. Request
step1.desc: Call any priced endpoint without headers. The API responds with 402 Payment Required.

step2.title: 2. Pay
step2.desc: Send the required USDC amount to the provided wallet address on the Base network.

step3.title: 3. Settle
step3.desc: Retry the request with your transaction hash in the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header.
